total.description: Total number of bookings in the result

BookingRequest.description: Request payload to create a new booking

calendarId.description: Identifier of the calendar to book in

slot.description: Slot date and time to book

BookingResponse.description: Booking data returned by the API

calendarId.description: Identifier of the calendar the booking belongs to

slot.description: Slot date and time of the booking

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the booking was created

createdBy.description: Identifier of the user who created the booking

CalendarGroupRequest.description: Request payload to create or update a calendar group

examples: Group for all calendars in Warehouse South
description.description: Detailed description of the group purpose

CalendarGroupResponse.description: Calendar group data returned by the API

description.description: Detailed description of the group purpose

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the group was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the group was last updated

CalendarRequest.description: Request payload to create or update a calendar

examples: Scheduling calendar for Loading Dock South
description.description: Detailed description of the calendar purpose

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier for the calendar

active.description: Whether the calendar is active and accepting bookings

groups.description: List of group codes to assign. null = no change; [] = remove all; ["code1"] = replace all

CalendarResponse.description: Calendar data returned by the API

description.description: Detailed description of the calendar purpose

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the calendar was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the calendar was last updated

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response returned for all non-2xx status codes

GenerateSlotsRequest.description: Request payload to generate slots for a calendar within a date range

calendarId.description: Identifier of the calendar to generate slots for

startDate.description: Start date of the generation range (inclusive)

endDate.description: End date of the generation range (inclusive, max 90 days from start)

GenerateSlotsResponse.description: Result of a slot generation operation

slotsSkipped.description: Number of slots skipped because they already existed

message.description: Human-readable summary of the generation result

ResourceData.description: Resource being booked (e.g., a truck, shipment, or cargo container)

data.description: Additional resource metadata as key-value pairs

SlotData.description: Date and time identifying a specific slot

total.description: Total number of slots in the result

SlotResponse.description: Booking slot data returned by the API

calendarId.description: Identifier of the calendar this slot belongs to

timeWindowId.description: Identifier of the time window that generated this slot

capacity.description: Maximum booking capacity for this slot

currentOccupancy.description: Number of current bookings in this slot

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the slot was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the slot was last updated

TimeWindowRequest.description: Request payload to create or update a time window within a calendar

startHour.description: Start hour of the time window (inclusive)

endHour.description: End hour of the time window (exclusive)

slotDurationMinutes.description: Duration of each slot in minutes

capacityPerSlot.description: Maximum number of bookings per slot

daysOfWeek.description: Comma-separated days of the week (1=Monday to 7=Sunday)

validFrom.description: Date from which this time window is valid

validTo.description: Date until which this time window is valid (null means no end date)

active.description: Whether the time window is active

TimeWindowResponse.description: Time window data returned by the API

id.description: Unique identifier of the time window

calendarId.description: Identifier of the calendar this time window belongs to

startHour.description: Start hour of the time window (inclusive)

endHour.description: End hour of the time window (exclusive)

slotDurationMinutes.description: Duration of each slot in minutes

capacityPerSlot.description: Maximum number of bookings per slot

daysOfWeek.description: Comma-separated days of the week (1=Monday to 7=Sunday)

validFrom.description: Date from which this time window is valid

validTo.description: Date until which this time window is valid (null means no end date)

active.description: Whether the time window is active

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the time window was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the time window was last updated

UpdateSlotStatusRequest.description: Request payload to update the status of a slot

status.description: New status for the slot (only OPEN or CLOSED allowed)

tags.name: Bookings
tags.description: Booking creation, cancellation, and query operations

tags.name: Calendars
tags.description: Calendar and time window management operations

tags.name: Slots
tags.description: Slot querying, generation, and status management operations

get.description: Retrieve bookings filtered by calendar and date range. Defaults to the next 30 days if no dates are provided.

parameters.description: Filter bookings by calendar identifier
parameters.name: calendarId

parameters.description: End date of the range (inclusive, defaults to start + 30 days)
parameters.name: endDate

parameters.description: Start date of the range (inclusive, defaults to today)
parameters.name: startDate

post.description: Create a new resource booking for a specific calendar and slot

parameters.description: Identifier of the user creating the booking
parameters.name: X-User-Id

409.description: Booking conflict (e.g., slot full or duplicate resource booking)

get.description: Retrieve all bookings associated with a specific resource identifier

parameters.description: Identifier of the resource to get bookings for
parameters.name: resourceId

200.description: List of bookings for the resource

get.description: Retrieve a specific booking by its unique identifier

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the booking
parameters.name: id

delete.description: Cancel an existing booking and release the slot capacity

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the booking to cancel
parameters.name: id

get.description: Retrieve all calendars, optionally filtered by active status or group code

parameters.description: When true, return only active calendars
parameters.name: active

parameters.description: Filter calendars belonging to this group code
parameters.name: groupCode

post.description: Create a new calendar with the provided configuration

get.description: Retrieve all time windows configured for a specific calendar

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the calendar
parameters.name: calendarId

post.description: Create a new time window within a calendar to define when slots can be generated

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the calendar
parameters.name: calendarId

put.description: Update an existing time window's configuration

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the calendar
parameters.name: calendarId

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the time window to update
parameters.name: timeWindowId

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the calendar to update
parameters.name: id

get.description: Retrieve a specific calendar by its unique identifier

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the calendar
parameters.name: id

delete.description: Soft-delete a calendar by setting it as inactive

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the calendar to deactivate
parameters.name: id

get.description: Retrieve all calendar groups, optionally filtered by active status

parameters.description: When true, return only active groups
parameters.name: active

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the group to update
parameters.name: id

get.description: Retrieve a specific calendar group by its unique identifier

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the group
parameters.name: id

delete.description: Soft-delete a calendar group by setting it as inactive

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the group to deactivate
parameters.name: id

get.description: Retrieve slots for a calendar, filtered by date range and availability. Defaults to the next 7 days if no dates are provided.

parameters.description: When true, return only slots with available capacity
parameters.name: available

parameters.description: Identifier of the calendar to list slots for
parameters.name: calendarId

parameters.description: End date of the range (inclusive, defaults to start + 7 days)
parameters.name: endDate

parameters.description: Start date of the range (inclusive, defaults to today)
parameters.name: startDate

post.description: Generate booking slots for a calendar within a date range based on its time window configurations. Existing slots are skipped.

get.description: Retrieve a specific slot by its unique identifier

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the slot
parameters.name: id

patch.description: Manually close or reopen a slot. Status can only be set to OPEN or CLOSED; FULL is managed automatically.

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the slot to update
parameters.name: id

info.title: MIOT Calendar API
info.description: Calendar booking microservice for resource scheduling. Provides calendar management, time window configuration, slot generation, and booking operations.
